findings.summary: Assumed launch_failed = timeout for 3h. Never checked modal app logs. Real cause was ModuleNotFoundError visible in first failed app.
findings.evidence: 8 spliceai apps crashed with same error. 63 orphan Modal apps from timeout kills. 3h wasted on timeout adjustments.
findings.proposed_fix: Auto-fetch modal app logs on stage failure in orchestrator. Hook: _resolve_stage_status should print last 10 log lines on failure.

findings.summary: Increased subprocess timeout 3x (120→180→360s) when fix was removing it. modal run --detach always returns. Timeout kills process but Modal continues.
findings.evidence: 4 commits adjusting timeout. 63 orphan apps. Root cause found on 5th attempt.
findings.proposed_fix: Modal skill gotcha #32 added. Memory saved. Orchestrator patched.

findings.summary: Manually launched stages 3 times instead of fixing orchestrator resource caps. Default GPU cap=1 was the throttle.
findings.evidence: 3 manual batch-launch scripts. One grep for DEFAULT_RESOURCE_CAPS would have found GPU:1.
findings.proposed_fix: Debug the orchestrator first, not work around it. Raised defaults to GPU:4, poll:15s, max:20.

findings.summary: nohup uv run > log produces empty files. uv buffers stdout. Tried 3 times before PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1.
findings.proposed_fix: Added os.environ PYTHONUNBUFFERED to orchestrator. Rule: always PYTHONUNBUFFERED when redirecting Python.

findings.summary: Fixed spliceai config loading but missed ['spliceai_profile'] key on Modal path. Required immediate follow-up commit.
findings.evidence: Commits 657e377 then 1529865. Didn't test Modal path before committing.
findings.proposed_fix: Probe Modal image or use modal shell before committing Modal script fixes.
